description: Small synthetic contract set for reproducible backend evaluation. No confidential or copied contract text is included.

paragraphs.heading: Payment
paragraphs.text: Invoices are due within thirty days after receipt.

paragraphs.heading: Termination
paragraphs.text: Either party may terminate this Agreement with thirty days written notice.

paragraphs.heading: Liability
paragraphs.text: Supplier liability is unlimited for confidentiality breaches.

paragraphs.heading: Confidentiality
paragraphs.text: Each party shall keep confidential information confidential during the term.

expected_clauses.snippet: Invoices are due within thirty days after receipt.

paragraphs.heading: Governing Law
paragraphs.text: This Agreement is governed by the laws of New York.

paragraphs.heading: Force Majeure
paragraphs.text: Neither party is liable for delays caused by events beyond reasonable control.

paragraphs.heading: Indemnification
paragraphs.text: Customer shall indemnify Supplier against third party claims arising from misuse.
